original_image_tags: At the bottom of the page, a handwritten annotation in red pencil reads "62 - 83844 - 55". There is also a handwritten initial "RD" in the bottom right margin.

judge.reason: Both descriptions identify handwritten annotations in the bottom area, but Description A specifies the text as '62 - 83844 - 55' and 'RD' while Description B calls the text illegible, creating a minor inconsistency without direct contradiction on verbatim content.
